raw_source_record.input_prompt:
Above is a conversation between two people: Gina and Jon. The conversation takes place over multiple days and the date of each conversation is wriiten at the beginning of the conversation.


Based on the above context, answer the following question.

Question: Why did Jon combine his clothing business with dance? Select the correct answer: (a) he is passionate about dance and fashion (b) Not mentioned in the conversation.  Short answer:
raw_source_record.info: {"golden_answer": {"b": "Not mentioned in the conversation", "a": "he is passionate about dance and fashion"}, "category": 5, "evidence": [{"speaker": "Gina", "dia_id": "D8:8", "text": "Thanks! I'm passionate about dance and fashion so combining them lets me show my creativity and share my love with others. Plus, I can add dance-inspired items to my store!"}]}
raw_source_record.origin_question: Why did Jon combine his clothing business with dance?
raw_source_record.dialog_bm25_dialog:
[{"role": "user", "content": "Context:
Coversation [9:32 am on 8 February, 2023]:
Speaker Ginasays : Hey Jon! Great hearing from you again. How have you been? BTW, I found a cool new fashion piece for my store. Can't wait to share with my customers.
Speaker Jonsays : Hey Gina! Congrats on the new fashion piece! Looks like your store is growing. Remenber the festival I told you about? Had that performance and it was awesome - so many people there complementing my dance moves. Dancing brings me joy and it was nice to be reminded why I'm passionate about it.
Speaker Ginasays : Wow! That looks great. You look badass on stage. BTW, what's your favorite part of running your own studio?
Speaker Jonsays : Thanks, Gina! I love running my own studio. It's great having the freedom to create a space and help dancers of all ages and levels express themselves. I'm super thrilled about dancing each day and seeing my students progress. It's so fulfilling.
Speaker Ginasays : That's awesome! I'm sure you feel great knowing your students are doing so well with dance. It's amazing what it can do for people! Oh, and btw - I've been working hard on my online store and just teamed up with a local artist for some cool designs. Check 'em out!
Speaker Jonsays : It looks awesome. Your commitment and creativity in your business really stands out. How'd you come up with these cool designs?
Speaker Ginasays : Thanks Jon! I got the idea from a fashion mag and saw there wasn't much around like it. So I worked with the artist to make it happen - it's all about being ahead of the game and giving my customers something different.
Speaker Jonsays : Nice one, Gina! You never shy away from a challenge and always try something new. I'm impressed by your willingness to take risks - it's really inspiring.
Speaker Ginasays : Thanks! Taking risks is scary but it's the only way to grow, right? Just part of the journey to success.
Speaker Jonsays : Yeah, I totally agree - taking risks is key for success. It's made me grow, and even got me out of my secure 9-5 as a banker. Now, I'm aiming to turn my dancing passion into a business. I'm determined to make it work, I just know it! That being said, I definitely don't underestimate the difficulties - it ain't been a walk in the park, that's for sure.
Speaker Ginasays : It's tough starting a biz, but don't let it get you down. You can make your studio work, I'm sure. And remember, I'm always here for you.
Speaker Jonsays : Thanks, Gina. Your help means a lot. I'll keep plugging away and stay optimistic.
Speaker Ginasays : This quote kept me positive through tough times. We all need a push sometimes, right? Even made a tattoo to remind myself about it.
Speaker Jonsays : Love the tattoo, did you just get it?
Speaker Ginasays : Thanks! Got the tattoo a few years ago, it stands for freedom - dancing without worrying what people think. A reminder to follow my passions and express myself.
Speaker Jonsays : Nice reminder, Gina! It's so important to have freedom and express ourselves without worry. Dance gives me an escape to be myself.
Speaker Ginasays : Totally agree, Jon. Dancing lets us be ourselves and ain't nothing like the feeling it gives us. You're so dedicated to your studio, it's inspiring. Chase those dreams, buddy!
Speaker Jonsays : Thanks, Gina! Your support means so much. I'm gonna keep chasing after those dreams. Dance is my passion, and I'm gonna keep working hard to make it a success!
Speaker Ginasays : This is the right attitude! How have you been juggling dance and business goals?
Speaker Jonsays : Thanks! Juggling both my passions can be tricky, but so rewarding. Dancing and running my biz need hard work, plus they give me energy for each other. My dance moves get me pumped to tackle my business goals, and successes there boost my drive to keep dreaming on the dance floor. It's a balancing act, but fun.
Speaker Ginasays : Wow, Jon! You're amazing at juggling both your passions. Finding that happy medium is key - keep going and don't stop dreaming, buddy!
Speaker Jonsays : Thanks, Gina! Your pep-talk really meant a lot. I'm not gonna give up on my dreams - my dance studio and biz ventures need the hard work I'm putting in. Love having you in my corner, thanks for always being there!
Speaker Ginasays : Yeah Jon, I'm here for you! Chasing our dreams and helping each other out. Let's keep movin' forward!

Coversation [11:24 am on 25 April, 2023]:
Speaker Jonsays : Hi Gina! I just wanted to fill you in on my business. Yesterday, I went to a fair to show off my studio, it was both stressful and great! I got some possible leads, so that was awesome. But overall, I've learned that this biz is no cakewalk and having confidence in yourself is important for making it successful!
Speaker Ginasays : Hey Jon, congrats on the fair! It's awesome to see your hard work paying off. Keep on pushing, pal, you're headed for greatness. Oh, and BTW, I started my own online clothing store not so long ago - pretty cool, huh?
Speaker Jonsays : Thanks, Gina! Appreciate your support. Your store looks great, I remember it!
Speaker Ginasays : Thanks, Jon! After losing my job, I wanted to take control of my own destiny and this seemed like the perfect way to do it. It's been a tough journey, but very rewarding.
Speaker Jonsays : Wow, you're awesome for going for it! Setbacks can help us reach our potential, right? I'm having trouble with my business project. Any advice on staying motivated even when times are tough?
Speaker Ginasays : Yeah Jon! Challenges are awesome for learning and growth. To stay motivated, I think of the big goal and why I'm doing it. I also get help from people who support me. And of course, I dance it out. Do you need advice on anything in particular?
Speaker Jonsays : I've been feeling kinda low on confidence lately. It's hard to run a business when you don't have faith in yourself. Any tips on how you stay confident in your business?
Speaker Ginasays : I get it, Jon. Confidence is important in business. I stay motivated by reminding myself of my successes and progress. It also helps to have a good support system. Just focus on why you started this – because you love it! Have faith in yourself, Jon. I do!
Speaker Jonsays : Thanks! Your words mean a lot. Gotta focus on success and why I started. You're right, I love it and that'll keep my confidence up.
Speaker Ginasays : No worries, Jon! Sounds like what I said was helpful. You're incredibly talented and passionate about dance. Don't forget, believe in yourself and your abilities. Tackle any obstacle that comes your way and keep shining!
Speaker Jonsays : Thanks! Your support means a lot. I'm gonna keep going and reach my dreams no matter what.
Speaker Ginasays : Go for it, Jon! You got this! Don't let anything stop you. We're in this together!
Speaker Jonsays : Appreciate your encouragement. We'll keep pushing each other on this path.
Speaker Ginasays : Yeah! Let's keep each other going. We can do it!

Coversation [1:26 pm on 3 April, 2023]:
Speaker Jonsays : Hey Gina, I had to shut down my bank account. It was tough, but I needed to do it for my biz.
Speaker Ginasays : Oh no, Jon! Sorry to hear that. Tough decision for you? How're you handling the changes?
Speaker Jonsays : It was a tough call, but I thought it'd help my biz grow. Handling changes has been hard, but I'm staying positive and looking ahead. Anything new for you?
Speaker Ginasays : Oof, that's tough, Jon. I got some new offers and promotions going on my online store to try and bring in new customers. It's been a wild ride starting my business, but I'm not giving up!
Speaker Jonsays : Nice one, Gina! Love how you never give up. What helps you stay motivated?
Speaker Ginasays : Thanks Jon! Dance is my stress relief and fashion fuels my creativity. I love finding new trends for my store. It keeps me motivated to keep growing. Check out this pic of my fave dance session!
Speaker Jonsays : Wow, that's great! What made you combine clothing biz and dance?
Speaker Ginasays : Thanks! I'm passionate about dance and fashion so combining them lets me show my creativity and share my love with others. Plus, I can add dance-inspired items to my store!
Speaker Jonsays : Nice work! Combining passions is always cool. How's it going?
Speaker Ginasays : Thanks! So far, so good - customers love the new offers and promotions, which means I'm seeing more sales. People seem to really like my designs, so I'm always on the hunt for unique, trendy pieces. Growing my customer base is the main focus right now.
Speaker Jonsays : Sounds like all your effort's paying off. Anything planned to grow your customer base?
Speaker Ginasays : Yeah, I have a few plans. I'm thinking of working with some fashion bloggers and influencers in the next few months to get more attention for my store. Plus, I'm going to do more ads so I can reach more people. I'm really focused on building my customer base and making my store a top destination for fashion fans. It's awesome to see it all coming together! You, Jon? What do you have going for your dance studio?
Speaker Jonsays : Thanks, Gina! I'm expanding my dance studio's social media presence and offering workshops and classes to local schools and centers. I'm also hosting a dance competition next month to showcase local talent and bring more attention to my studio. All the work's paying off - I'm seeing progress and the dancers are so excited. It's such a great feeling to give a place where people can express themselves through dance!
Speaker Ginasays : Wow! That's fantastic that your studio's expanding and giving dancers an outlet. So proud of the progress you've made - keep it up!
Speaker Jonsays : Thanks! Your backing means a lot. I'm trying to make my plan work, even though it's been tough. Your encouragement really helps. Are you coming to the event next month? Love to have you there!
Speaker Ginasays : Woah, cool event! What's gonna be happening? I'd love to join in and show my support!
Speaker Jonsays : Thanks, Gina! My dance studio and some other schools are bringing their best moves for an awesome night of performances and judging. It'll be super creative and fun. Come join us!
Speaker Ginasays : Sounds great! I'm definitely in for the show.
Speaker Jonsays : Cool! Can't wait to see you!
Speaker Ginasays : Thanks, Jon! See you at the event!
Speaker Jonsays : Gina, good luck with your store!
Speaker Ginasays : Thanks, Jon! Appreciate the kind words. <3
Speaker Jonsays : Sure, I am always there for you!
Speaker Ginasays : Thanks! Your support means a lot. I'm gonna keep pursuing my goals and I hope you do too!
Speaker Jonsays : Thanks! I won't quit on my dreams. Your words really motivate me. Bye!
Speaker Ginasays : Bye Jon! You got this! Believe in yourself and keep pushing. Take care!

Coversation [4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023]:
Speaker Ginasays : Hey Jon! Good to see you. What's up? Anything new?
Speaker Jonsays : Hey Gina! Good to see you too. Lost my job as a banker yesterday, so I'm gonna take a shot at starting my own business.
Speaker Ginasays : Sorry about your job Jon, but starting your own business sounds awesome! Unfortunately, I also lost my job at Door Dash this month. What business are you thinking of?
Speaker Jonsays : Sorry to hear that! I'm starting a dance studio 'cause I'm passionate about dancing and it'd be great to share it with others.
Speaker Ginasays : That's cool, Jon! What got you into this biz?
Speaker Jonsays : I've been into dancing since I was a kid and it's been my passion and escape. I wanna start a dance studio so I can teach others the joy that dancing brings me.
Speaker Ginasays : Wow Jon, same here! Dance is pretty much my go-to for stress relief. Got any fave styles?
Speaker Jonsays : Cool, Gina! I love all dances, but contemporary is my top pick. It's so expressive and powerful! What's your fave?
Speaker Ginasays : Yeah, me too! Contemporary dance is so expressive and graceful - it really speaks to me.
Speaker Jonsays : Wow, great idea! Let's go to a dance class, it'll be so much fun!
Speaker Ginasays : Yeah! Let's explore some new dance moves. We should plan a dance session soon!
Speaker Jonsays : Yeah definitely! Wanna see my moves next Fri? Can't wait!
Speaker Ginasays : Sounds great, Jon! Next Friday works. Let's boogie!
Speaker Jonsays : Wow, I'm excited too! This is gonna be great!
Speaker Ginasays : Wow! What did you get?
Speaker Jonsays : Woah, that pic's from when my dance crew took home first in a local comp last year. It was amazing up on that stage! I'm super keen to spread that intensity with other peeps. Gina, you ever been in any dance comps or shows?
Speaker Ginasays : I used to compete in a few dance competitions and shows - my fav memory was when my team won first place at a regionals at age fifteen. It was an awesome feeling of accomplishment!
Speaker Jonsays : Wow! Winning first place is amazing! What dance were you doing?
Speaker Ginasays : Thanks! We just did a contemporary piece called "Finding Freedom." It was really emotional and powerful.
Speaker Jonsays : Wow, that must've been great! Check my ideal dance studio by the water.
Speaker Ginasays : Cool setup! Man, you can't deny that view! Got time to rehearse with a biz and a new store?
Speaker Jonsays : Hopefully, we will find a place like this that will inspire us!
Speaker Ginasays : Wow, it looks great! What dances do you practice? Got any projects planned?
Speaker Jonsays : Thanks! I rehearsed with a small group of dancers after work. We do all kinds of dances, from contemporary to hip-hop. We've got some cool projects in the works. Finishing up choreography to perform at a nearby festival next month. Can't wait!
Speaker Ginasays : Wow, it looks awesome! Are they yours at the festival? They're so graceful!
Speaker Jonsays : Yeah, they're the ones performing at the festival! They've been practicing hard and will definitely impress with their grace and skill.
Speaker Ginasays : Wow, they look great! Can't wait to see them rock the festival. Gonna be awesome!
Speaker Jonsays : Yeah, awesome! Glad to be part of it.

Coversation [3:14 pm on 11 May, 2023]:
Speaker Jonsays : Hi! Since we last spoke I am still working on the dance studio and things are looking up!
Speaker Ginasays : Hi! You're so inspiring taking it on and opening your own studio!
Speaker Jonsays : Thanks! Losing my job gave me the push to finally start my dream business: my own dance studio! Now I'm stepping into the unknown and hoping for the best.
Speaker Ginasays : It must be scary stepping into the unknown but I know you can do it, Jon. With your determination and drive, your dance studio will be a huge success. Keep that positive outlook and keep going!
Speaker Jonsays : Thanks! It's a bit scary, but I just think about my love for dance and how it makes me feel. It's been my stress-buster since childhood!
Speaker Ginasays : Gotcha, Jon! Dance is my stress fix too. As soon as I start, all my worries vanish. It's amazing what we can do for our own mental health with something we enjoy.
Speaker Jonsays : Yeah, Gina! Dancing helps me de-stress. It's where I'm most alive. It's a must-have in my life.
Speaker Ginasays : I get it, Jon. Dance is just me -- I can't picture life without it. It's like air.
Speaker Jonsays : Yep! Dancing is like second nature to me. I'm living my dream by having my own dance studio and teaching others.
Speaker Ginasays : You're living the dream and inspiring others too! Your studio will totally change things for lots of folks.
Speaker Jonsays : I hope so, Gina. I want to create a place for people to dance and express themselves - it's been a dream of mine.
Speaker Ginasays : That's a great dream, Jon! Giving people a place to express themselves with dance is really important. Your studio is gonna make a huge difference. Can't wait to see it happen!
Speaker Jonsays : Thanks! Your help means a lot. Keep you posted on the dance studio progress.
Speaker Ginasays : Thanks! Really appreciate you keeping me in the loop on this cool project. Can't wait to hear more and watch it come to life! Oh, btw, I had an interview for a design internship yesterday! It was so cool.
Speaker Jonsays : Wow, Gina, I'm stoked about this! Taking a risk is scary, but I'm sure following my dreams will pay off in the end. How did the interview go?
Speaker Ginasays : It was great!
Speaker Jonsays : Glad to hear it. Been practicing dance routines lately, it keeps my mind focused and motivated.
Speaker Ginasays : Wow! That's great. Dancing is awesome for staying focused. Wanna show me a routine sometime?
Speaker Jonsays : Sure, Gina! Wanna see one of my routines? Lemme know when you got time and I'll send you a vid.
Speaker Ginasays : Yeah, Jon, I'll watch your routine! So proud of you!
Speaker Jonsays : Thanks a lot! Your help really means a lot. I'll get the video to you soon!
Speaker Ginasays : No prob! Always here to help. Can't wait to see the vid!

Coversation [9:32 am on 8 February, 2023]:
Speaker Ginasays : Hey Jon! Great hearing from you again. How have you been? BTW, I found a cool new fashion piece for my store. Can't wait to share with my customers.
Speaker Jonsays : Hey Gina! Congrats on the new fashion piece! Looks like your store is growing. Remenber the festival I told you about? Had that performance and it was awesome - so many people there complementing my dance moves. Dancing brings me joy and it was nice to be reminded why I'm passionate about it.
Speaker Ginasays : Wow! That looks great. You look badass on stage. BTW, what's your favorite part of running your own studio?
Speaker Jonsays : Thanks, Gina! I love running my own studio. It's great having the freedom to create a space and help dancers of all ages and levels express themselves. I'm super thrilled about dancing each day and seeing my students progress. It's so fulfilling.
Speaker Ginasays : That's awesome! I'm sure you feel great knowing your students are doing so well with dance. It's amazing what it can do for people! Oh, and btw - I've been working hard on my online store and just teamed up with a local artist for some cool designs. Check 'em out!
Speaker Jonsays : It looks awesome. Your commitment and creativity in your business really stands out. How'd you come up with these cool designs?
Speaker Ginasays : Thanks Jon! I got the idea from a fashion mag and saw there wasn't much around like it. So I worked with the artist to make it happen - it's all about being ahead of the game and giving my customers something different.
Speaker Jonsays : Nice one, Gina! You never shy away from a challenge and always try something new. I'm impressed by your willingness to take risks - it's really inspiring.
Speaker Ginasays : Thanks! Taking risks is scary but it's the only way to grow, right? Just part of the journey to success.
Speaker Jonsays : Yeah, I totally agree - taking risks is key for success. It's made me grow, and even got me out of my secure 9-5 as a banker. Now, I'm aiming to turn my dancing passion into a business. I'm determined to make it work, I just know it! That being said, I definitely don't underestimate the difficulties - it ain't been a walk in the park, that's for sure.
Speaker Ginasays : It's tough starting a biz, but don't let it get you down. You can make your studio work, I'm sure. And remember, I'm always here for you.
Speaker Jonsays : Thanks, Gina. Your help means a lot. I'll keep plugging away and stay optimistic.
Speaker Ginasays : This quote kept me positive through tough times. We all need a push sometimes, right? Even made a tattoo to remind myself about it.
Speaker Jonsays : Love the tattoo, did you just get it?
Speaker Ginasays : Thanks! Got the tattoo a few years ago, it stands for freedom - dancing without worrying what people think. A reminder to follow my passions and express myself.
Speaker Jonsays : Nice reminder, Gina! It's so important to have freedom and express ourselves without worry. Dance gives me an escape to be myself.
Speaker Ginasays : Totally agree, Jon. Dancing lets us be ourselves and ain't nothing like the feeling it gives us. You're so dedicated to your studio, it's inspiring. Chase those dreams, buddy!
Speaker Jonsays : Thanks, Gina! Your support means so much. I'm gonna keep chasing after those dreams. Dance is my passion, and I'm gonna keep working hard to make it a success!
Speaker Ginasays : This is the right attitude! How have you been juggling dance and business goals?
Speaker Jonsays : Thanks! Juggling both my passions can be tricky, but so rewarding. Dancing and running my biz need hard work, plus they give me energy for each other. My dance moves get me pumped to tackle my business goals, and successes there boost my drive to keep dreaming on the dance floor. It's a balancing act, but fun.
Speaker Ginasays : Wow, Jon! You're amazing at juggling both your passions. Finding that happy medium is key - keep going and don't stop dreaming, buddy!
Speaker Jonsays : Thanks, Gina! Your pep-talk really meant a lot. I'm not gonna give up on my dreams - my dance studio and biz ventures need the hard work I'm putting in. Love having you in my corner, thanks for always being there!
Speaker Ginasays : Yeah Jon, I'm here for you! Chasing our dreams and helping each other out. Let's keep movin' forward!

Coversation [4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023]:
Speaker Ginasays : Hey Jon! Good to see you. What's up? Anything new?
Speaker Jonsays : Hey Gina! Good to see you too. Lost my job as a banker yesterday, so I'm gonna take a shot at starting my own business.
Speaker Ginasays : Sorry about your job Jon, but starting your own business sounds awesome! Unfortunately, I also lost my job at Door Dash this month. What business are you thinking of?
Speaker Jonsays : Sorry to hear that! I'm starting a dance studio 'cause I'm passionate about dancing and it'd be great to share it with others.
Speaker Ginasays : That's cool, Jon! What got you into this biz?
Speaker Jonsays : I've been into dancing since I was a kid and it's been my passion and escape. I wanna start a dance studio so I can teach others the joy that dancing brings me.
Speaker Ginasays : Wow Jon, same here! Dance is pretty much my go-to for stress relief. Got any fave styles?
Speaker Jonsays : Cool, Gina! I love all dances, but contemporary is my top pick. It's so expressive and powerful! What's your fave?
Speaker Ginasays : Yeah, me too! Contemporary dance is so expressive and graceful - it really speaks to me.
Speaker Jonsays : Wow, great idea! Let's go to a dance class, it'll be so much fun!
Speaker Ginasays : Yeah! Let's explore some new dance moves. We should plan a dance session soon!
Speaker Jonsays : Yeah definitely! Wanna see my moves next Fri? Can't wait!

Speaker Jonsays : Wow, I'm excited too! This is gonna be great!
Speaker Ginasays : Wow! What did you get?
Speaker Jonsays : Woah, that pic's from when my dance crew took home first in a local comp last year. It was amazing up on that stage! I'm super keen to spread that intensity with other peeps. Gina, you ever been in any dance comps or shows?
Speaker Ginasays : I used to compete in a few dance competitions and shows - my fav memory was when my team won first place at a regionals at age fifteen. It was an awesome feeling of accomplishment!
Speaker Jonsays : Wow! Winning first place is amazing! What dance were you doing?
Speaker Ginasays : Thanks! We just did a contemporary piece called "Finding Freedom." It was really emotional and powerful.
Speaker Jonsays : Wow, that must've been great! Check my ideal dance studio by the water.
Speaker Ginasays : Cool setup! Man, you can't deny that view! Got time to rehearse with a biz and a new store?
Speaker Jonsays : Hopefully, we will find a place like this that will inspire us!
Speaker Ginasays : Wow, it looks great! What dances do you practice? Got any projects planned?
Speaker Jonsays : Thanks! I rehearsed with a small group of dancers after work. We do all kinds of dances, from contemporary to hip-hop. We've got some cool projects in the works. Finishing up choreography to perform at a nearby festival next month. Can't wait!
Speaker Ginasays : Wow, it looks awesome! Are they yours at the festival? They're so graceful!
Speaker Jonsays : Yeah, they're the ones performing at the festival! They've been practicing hard and will definitely impress with their grace and skill.
Speaker Ginasays : Wow, they look great! Can't wait to see them rock the festival. Gonna be awesome!
Speaker Jonsays : Yeah, awesome! Glad to be part of it.

Coversation [1:26 pm on 3 April, 2023]:
Speaker Jonsays : Hey Gina, I had to shut down my bank account. It was tough, but I needed to do it for my biz.

Speaker Ginasays : Oof, that's tough, Jon. I got some new offers and promotions going on my online store to try and bring in new customers. It's been a wild ride starting my business, but I'm not giving up!
Speaker Jonsays : Nice one, Gina! Love how you never give up. What helps you stay motivated?

Plus, I'm going to do more ads so I can reach more people. I'm really focused on building my customer base and making my store a top destination for fashion fans. It's awesome to see it all coming together! You, Jon? What do you have going for your dance studio?
Speaker Jonsays : Thanks, Gina! I'm expanding my dance studio's social media presence and offering workshops and classes to local schools and centers. I'm also hosting a dance competition next month to showcase local talent and bring more attention to my studio. All the work's paying off - I'm seeing progress and the dancers are so excited. It's such a great feeling to give a place where people can express themselves through dance!
Speaker Ginasays : Wow! That's fantastic that your studio's expanding and giving dancers an outlet. So proud of the progress you've made - keep it up!
Speaker Jonsays : Thanks! Your backing means a lot. I'm trying to make my plan work, even though it's been tough. Your encouragement really helps. Are you coming to the event next month? Love to have you there!
Speaker Ginasays : Woah, cool event! What's gonna be happening? I'd love to join in and show my support!
Speaker Jonsays : Thanks, Gina! My dance studio and some other schools are bringing their best moves for an awesome night of performances and judging. It'll be super creative and fun. Come join us!
Speaker Ginasays : Sounds great! I'm definitely in for the show.
Speaker Jonsays : Cool! Can't wait to see you!
Speaker Ginasays : Thanks, Jon! See you at the event!
Speaker Jonsays : Gina, good luck with your store!
Speaker Ginasays : Thanks, Jon! Appreciate the kind words. <3
Speaker Jonsays : Sure, I am always there for you!
Speaker Ginasays : Thanks! Your support means a lot. I'm gonna keep pursuing my goals and I hope you do too!
Speaker Jonsays : Thanks! I won't quit on my dreams. Your words really motivate me. Bye!
Speaker Ginasays : Bye Jon! You got this! Believe in yourself and keep pushing. Take care!

Speaker Ginasays : Believe in yourself, Jon! The process may be tough, but you got this. Push through and it'll be worth it. Don't forget to take breaks and dance it out when you need to destress!
Speaker Jonsays : Glad I have you in my corner! Gotta make time to dance and vent, that's for sure. We'll make it through this - hang in there!
Speaker Ginasays : Thanks, Jon! Appreciate your support!
Speaker Jonsays : Let's keep going and chase our dreams!
Speaker Ginasays : Yeah! We've done so much, and there's nothing but good stuff coming. Let's keep going after our goals and making them happen.
Speaker Jonsays : Success is almost here. We got this!

Speaker Ginasays : Wow, they look great! Can't wait to see them rock the festival. Gonna be awesome!
Speaker Jonsays : Yeah, awesome! Glad to be part of it.
